title: Relevance Judgments and Retrieval Metrics · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed retrieval review reconstructs relevance judgments and retrieval metrics from source, document, chunk, model, index, query, candidate, response, citation, evaluation, operations, and stakeholder evidence, then attacks one retained misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for retrieval evaluation notebook and judgment policy after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defens…
objectives: Define binary or graded relevance, assessor instructions, pooling, disagreement, unjudged handling, and query-specific evidence needs.
Compute precision, recall, F-score, success, and hit rate at an explicit cutoff and explain which failure each reveals.
Compute reciprocal rank, average precision, mean average precision, DCG, and nDCG from ordered judgments with correct denominators.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

options.text: For separate evidence from confidence, run one convenient Rag Retrieval Comparison Uncertainty query, omit corpus and version identity, relevance judgments, tenant policy, changed documents, abstention, citations, failure and recovery, then accept a plausible answer as RAG proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Rag Retrieval Comparison Uncertainty, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

steps.title: RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Retrieval Comparison Uncertainty
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Rag Retrieval Comparison Uncertainty: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review RAG engineering team handles case 9945 during an enterprise retrieval migration canary. Build deterministic Python evidence to separate precision, recall, reciprocal rank, graded gain, cutoff, and judgment assumptions; measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score; then move the only supporting passage to the middle of the context and rerun the position slice. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use paired per-query differences, confidence intervals or resampling, practical thresholds, and regression inspection when comparing retrievers.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Retrieval Comparison Uncertainty.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Retrieval Comparison Uncertainty, keep Rag Retrieval Comparison Uncertainty connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use paired per-query differences, confidence intervals or resampling, practical thresholds, and regression inspection when comparing retrievers.

At RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Retrieval Comparison Uncertainty, trace this concrete input and predict ingestion, normalization, retrieval, filter, fusion, reranking, context, claim, citation, abstention, latency, cost, failure, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A review RAG engineering team handles case 9945 during an enterprise retrieval migration canary. Build deterministic Python evidence to separate precision, recall, reciprocal rank, graded gain, cutoff, and judgment assumptions; measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score; then move the only supporting passage to the middle of the context and rerun the position slice. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use paired per-query differences, confidence intervals or resampling, practical thresholds, and regression inspection when comparing retrievers.

For RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Retrieval Comparison Uncertainty, challenge the documented misconception with changed-query, changed-corpus, relevance, retrieval, grounding, citation, adversarial, accessibility, failure, recovery, and controlled native or production-transfer evidence: A one-point metric increase on one fixed set is automatically a meaningful win.
